studyName: Retinoblastoma Aqueous Humor Liquid Biopsy Repository

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, tumor stage based on IIRC and AJCC, primary tumor treatment, timing of sample extractions, eye enucleation and any high risk pathologic features, and metastatic disease status.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type (DNA)

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected (right or left eye)

variables.name: EYE_ENUCLEATED
variables.description: Was the eye enucleated? Y/N

variables.name: HIGH_RISK_PATHOLOGIC_FEATURES
variables.description: At enucleation, high risk features: massive choroidal invasion, pre-laminar invasion, post-laminar invasion, extra-scleral invision, anterior segment invasion

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor information from aqueous humor liquid biopsy or tumor from enucleated eye

variables.name: METASTATIC_DISEASE
variables.description: The patient developed metastatic disease? Y/N

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: TIMING_SAMPLE
variables.description: Timing of sample extraction during therapy: Diagnosis (DX), end of course of systemic chemotherapy (END CEV), end of course of Intra-arterial chemotherapy (END IAC), intravitreal injections (listed in order as IvitC-A, B, C), at the time of a recurrence, at the time of primary enucleation (PE) or secondary enucleation (ES), At the time of Avastin injection (labelled in order A, B, C)

variables.name: TUMOR_PRIMARY_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample (systemic chemotherapy, intra-arterial chemotherapy, enucleation)

variables.name: TUMOR_STAGE_AJCC
variables.description: Tumor stage of sample based on AJCC RB classification as Mallipatna, A. C. et al. in AJCC Cancer Staging Manual, 8th ed. (eds Mahul B. Amin et al.) Ch. 68, 819-831 (Springer, 2017).

variables.name: TUMOR_STAGE_IIRC
variables.description: Tumor stage of sample based on IIRC RB classification as A-E as in A. Linn Murphree. Intraocular Retinoblastoma: the case for a new group classification. Ophthalmol Clin North Am. 2005 Mar; 18(1):41-53. PMID: 15763190

tables.description: This subject phenotype table includes subject's gender, race, ethnicity, affection status for retinoblastoma type, RB1 mutation status, age at diagnosis, and duration of follow-up.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Affection status for unilateral or bilateral retinoblastoma

variables.name: AGE_Dx
variables.description: Age at Diagnosis

variables.name: Ethnicity
variables.description: Ethnicity

variables.name: Follow_Up
variables.description: Follow up as of November 2022 in months

variables.name: GERMLINE RB1 MTN
variables.description: RB1 mutation detected in the peripheral blood, germline disease (Y/N)

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Race

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: The subject consent data table includes subject IDs, consent information, and subject's biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table contains mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
